improvement: Executable integrity contract for continuity contradiction and supersession links

verification.route: isolated Node test runner using byte-identical pre-commit files

recovered_memory: Continuity history must preserve older observations and express changed interpretation through explicit supersedes or contradicts links rather than destructive overwrite.

claim_states.observed: The existing index schema exposes contradicts and supersedes links, and CM-0009 uses supersedes to preserve CM-0003 as historical evidence.
claim_states.inferred: Without a graph integrity gate, future records could silently create dangling, duplicate, self-referential, or cyclic history links.
claim_states.proposed: Run validate-continuity-relations.mjs whenever the continuity index changes.
claim_states.superseded: The earlier implicit-only relation rule is superseded operationally by an executable validator, while its historical artifacts remain preserved.
claim_states.unresolved: The canonical queue has not yet been compacted to include M-002; this additive queue update records the candidate without overwriting other teams.

privacy_boundary: Only public repository files and commit metadata were inspected. Raw chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
truth_limit: Structural relation integrity does not establish the truth of any indexed claim or the correctness of a human contradiction decision.
